<<Reflections on Insignificance>>

The feeling of insignificance is a path. It echoes in the heart of many, a path. It often comes with the weight of the world, a path.  

* * *  

The world moves on, a path. It doesn’t pause for one, a path. It continues, a path.  

* * *  

A book can offer a path. It can guide through the dark, a path. It can remind you of your place, a path.
